display.purpose: Page title only. 'Sassy Lash & Skin' header. One instance per view.

headline.purpose: Admin section headings, confirmation page h1.

title.purpose: Service card names, prominent component labels.

body.purpose: Descriptions, form labels, all running text. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Step labels (uppercase), duration badges, small metadata.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: This system uses no shadows. Depth is achieved through border shifts and tonal backgrounds exclusively.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focus visible ring on interactive elements (inputs, buttons). Uses rose-300 at 3px offset.

motion.name: ease-out-state
motion.purpose: All state transitions: border color, background color. 150ms duration.

components.name: Primary Button (CTA)
components.description: Full-width on mobile. Used for 'Request Appointment' and primary admin actions.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;600&display=swap'); .ds-btn-primary { display: block; width: 100%; background: #F43F5E; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #E11D48; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #FDA4AF; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #FDA4AF; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Selectable service tile. 2px border shifts through hover and selected states.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@600&family=Inter:wght@400&display=swap'); .ds-service-card { display: block; width: 100%; text-align: left; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: 2px solid #E7E5E4; background: #FFFFFF; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-service-card:hover { border-color: #FECDD3; } .ds-service-card--selected { border-color: #FB7185; background: #FFF1F2; } .ds-service-card__inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; } .ds-service-card__name { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #292524; display: block; } .ds-service-card__desc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #78716C; margin: 4px 0 0; } .ds-service-card__duration { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #A8A29E; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Slot Button
components.description: Time slot selector. Appears in a 3-4 column grid. Border shifts carry all state.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@500&display=swap'); .ds-slot-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 8px; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-slot-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } } .ds-slot-btn { padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #E7E5E4; background: #FFFFFF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #44403C; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-slot-btn:hover { border-color: #FECDD3; } .ds-slot-btn--selected { border-color: #FB7185; background: #FFF1F2; color: #E11D48; } .ds-slot-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #FDA4AF; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text field. Used for name, phone, email in the booking form.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;600&display=swap'); .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-field__label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #44403C; } .ds-field__input { width: 100%; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #D6D3D1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #292524; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-field__input::placeholder { color: #A8A29E; } .ds-field__input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #FDA4AF; }

components.name: Booking Summary Block
components.description: Confirmation of selected service and time before client fills their info. The most color-dense element on the page.
components.html:
Full Set

Monday, July 7 at 10:00 AM
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@600&family=Inter:wght@400&display=swap'); .ds-booking-summary { background: #FFF1F2; border: 1px solid #FECDD3; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-booking-summary__service { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #9F1239; margin: 0; } .ds-booking-summary__time { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #E11D48; margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Step Label
components.description: Section header in the progressive booking flow. Small, uppercase, Fog-colored. Orients without competing.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@600&display=swap'); .ds-step-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #A8A29E; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin: 0; }

components.name: Page Header
components.description: Brand header on the booking page. White background, bottom border, centered name.
components.html:
Sassy Lash & Skin

Book your appointment below
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@700&family=Inter:wght@400&display=swap'); .ds-page-header { background: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid #E7E5E4; padding: 20px 16px; text-align: center; } .ds-page-header__title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #292524; letter-spacing: -0.025em; margin: 0; } .ds-page-header__subtitle { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #78716C; margin: 4px 0 0; }

narrative.overview:
The booking interface for Sassy Lash & Skin is not a scheduling tool that happens to have a logo. It is a first impression of a business with personality: warm, real, a little particular, and clearly good at what it does. Regulars should feel at home. New clients should feel like they found something worth booking. Every design decision answers to that.

The palette is warm neutrals carrying the surface, with rose woven through every moment of touch: selections, confirmations, focus rings, the CTA. Not a shy accent, not a hero color. Rose is at 35-50% of interactive elements because warmth is the booking experience. Typography pairs Plus Jakarta Sans at headings with Inter at body. The contrast between the two adds character without noise.

This system explicitly rejects: the corporate blue grid-table aesthetic of Calendly and Acuity, cheap-feminine design (pink glitter, script fonts, clip-art florals), and anything moody or dark.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral foundation (stone) with rose woven through all interactive and highlight states
Two-font system: expressive display sans (Plus Jakarta Sans) at headings, Inter at body
Flat elevation: depth through border shifts and tonal backgrounds, never shadows
Progressive disclosure layout (service, date, time, form) feels like steps, not a form
Mobile-first: most clients book on their phones; touch targets always 44px minimum

rules.name: The Woven Rose Rule
rules.body: Rose is not a hero color and not a shy accent. It lives on all interactive elements in their selected, focused, and active states. Its warmth is the booking experience. Do not reduce it to a single CTA button.

rules.name: The Warm Foundation Rule
rules.body: Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) as the page background. Cream Canvas (#FAFAF9) is the base; Warm White is for cards set against it.

rules.name: The Double-Voice Rule
rules.body: Use Plus Jakarta Sans (display, headline, title) when the client reads about a choice. Use Inter (body, label) when they read instructions or form data. Never mix within a single semantic block.

rules.name: The Scale Rule
rules.body: Minimum ratio between adjacent hierarchy steps is 1.25. No flat type scales.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If you reach for box-shadow, stop. Solve with a border shift or background tint. Shadows are not prohibited, but none have been needed in this system, and that is the point.

dos: Do use Plus Jakarta Sans for all headings, service names, card titles, and the page title. Keep Inter for body copy, form labels, step labels, and metadata.
Do let rose show up at every moment of client engagement: hover borders, selected borders, focus rings, the CTA button, the booking summary.
Do use Cream Canvas (#FAFAF9) as the page base. Never pure white as the background.
Do design for mobile first. Touch targets 44px minimum.
Do use 2px borders on service cards. The weight signals selection affordance.
Do keep elevation flat. Solve depth with border shifts and tonal backgrounds before reaching for shadows.
Do keep step labels small, uppercase, and Fog-colored. They orient without competing.
donts: Don't design this like Calendly or Acuity. No corporate blue, no grid-heavy tables, no scheduling-software feel.
Don't use pink glitter, script fonts for UI copy, clip-art florals, or obvious cheap-feminine patterns. Luxe, not dollar-store pink.
Don't introduce dark mode or dark surfaces. Light mode only.
Don't reach for box-shadow without exhausting border shifts and tonal backgrounds first.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Use Warm Garnet solid.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't reduce rose to one button. The warmth comes from rose woven through all interaction states.
Don't use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) as text or page background.
